name: leyline
description: Lightweight inline code completion using configurable AI endpoints

virtualWorkspaces.description: Requires network access to AI endpoints.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Endpoint and model settings are ignored in untrusted workspaces to prevent API key exfiltration.

leyline.enabled.description: Master switch for inline code completion. Toggle with the Leyline status bar icon or the 'Leyline: Toggle' command.

leyline.provider.markdownDescription:
Which AI backend to use for completions.
- **codestral** — Mistral's FIM model via cloud API (requires API key).
- **ollama** — Any FIM-capable model running locally (no API key needed).

leyline.tabOverride.markdownDescription: Let `Tab` accept inline completions when IntelliSense is **not** visible. When IntelliSense is open, `Tab` still accepts the IntelliSense suggestion. Disable this if `Tab` conflicts with another extension.

leyline.enable.markdownDescription:
Control completions per language. Keys are [VS Code language IDs](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/languages/identifiers).

Example: `{ "*": true, "markdown": false, "json": false }` disables completions in Markdown and JSON files while keeping them everywhere else.

leyline.disableInFiles.markdownDescription:
Glob patterns for files where completions are disabled.

Example: `["**/*.md", "**/.env", "**/secrets/**"]`

leyline.multiline.markdownDescription:
Controls how many lines a single completion can span.
- **auto** — Single-line by default; multi-line inside empty function/class bodies, docstrings, and JSDoc.
- **always** — Always allow multi-line completions.
- **never** — Stop at the first newline.

leyline.debounceMs.description: How long to wait (ms) after you stop typing before requesting a completion. Lower values feel snappier but send more requests.

leyline.prefixLines.description: Lines of code before the cursor sent as context. More lines give the model more context but increase request size.

leyline.suffixLines.description: Lines of code after the cursor sent as context. Helps the model avoid duplicating code that already follows.

leyline.requestTimeout.description: Maximum seconds to wait for a completion response. Increase if you use a slow model or high-latency endpoint.

leyline.cacheSize.description: Number of recent completions kept in memory. Cached completions appear instantly when you undo and retype. Set to 0 to disable.

leyline.treeSitter.markdownDescription:
Use [Tree-sitter](https://tree-sitter.github.io/) to validate completions before showing them. If a completion would introduce syntax errors, it is silently discarded.

The grammar for each language is downloaded once on first use (~200 KB per language) and cached locally.

leyline.codestral.endpoint.markdownDescription: Codestral API endpoint. Leave empty to use the default (`https://codestral.mistral.ai`). Change this to point to an Azure AI or custom deployment.

leyline.codestral.model.markdownDescription: Model identifier sent in the API request. Leave empty for the default (`codestral-latest`).

leyline.codestral.maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens the model may generate per completion.

leyline.ollama.endpoint.markdownDescription: Ollama API endpoint. Leave empty for the default (`http://localhost:11434`). Change this to connect to a remote Ollama instance.

leyline.ollama.model.markdownDescription: Ollama model name. Leave empty for the default (`qwen2.5-coder:7b`). Use any FIM-capable model (e.g., `codellama:7b`, `deepseek-coder:6.7b`).

leyline.ollama.maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens the model may generate per completion.

scripts.generate-icons: bunx fantasticon assets --output assets --name leyline --font-types woff --asset-types json --font-height 1024 --normalize
